title: Crispy Garlic Tostadas
description: A quick-fix saudi arabian dish featuring crispy corn tortillas topped with a savory garlic-spiked tahini sauce and fresh herbs.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add garlic cloves and cumin seeds to the hot oil; stir for about 1 minute until fragrant but not burnt.
Remove from heat and blend mixture into tahini sauce with a little water if necessary (adjust seasoning as needed).
Warm tortillas in a separate frying pan or on a skillet over medium-high heat. Keep warm once ready to serve.
Top each tortilla with a spoonful of the garlic-tahini sauce, sprinkle with fresh herbs and additional salt for flavoring.
